AI accelerator / compute substrate domain — Y_compute candidate (missing axis in Y1..Y9 governance). Honesty-triad silicon: provenance bit (~2.78%=phi/sigma_n overhead), promotion-counter MMU, BT-id ISA. Selection: dataflow CGRA + wafer-scale + phi/n=1/3 sparsity (Cerebras + SambaNova hybrid). Sessions: omega-cycle-ai-native-arch-beyond-gpu-2026-04-26. Cycles: BT-AI1 (phi/n N:M sparsity on Llama-3 7B, MMLU/GSM8K), BT-AI2 (6-tile honesty-bit scheduler simulator, SimPy). Verdict MEDIUM (design-HIGH / silicon-LOW). Atlas writes 0 (4 candidates only).
